title: Data Questions, Displays, Summaries, and Responsible Claims · Quantity Clinic: Data Displays
summary: Investigate service wait times and satisfaction while protecting the context behind the data. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math beg data displays increment in a community-service data story. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose tables and graphs whose encodings fit the variable and comparison.
Classify variables and evaluate whether a sample can represent the target population.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

steps.title: Calculate Data Displays evidence
steps.instruction: The observed values are 12, 16, 20, 16 minutes. Calculate their mean. Use the result to decide Data Displays for a community-service data story.
steps.why: The Data Displays result for a community-service data story is incomplete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: Add all 4 observations and divide by 4; retain the time unit. Reconcile the result with this competency evidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose tables and graphs whose encodings fit the variable and comparison.
